title: Clarte
subtitle: Socratic Voice AI Agent
description: A structured cognitive framework for guided dialogue—voice-first tutoring that asks the right next question, keeps context, and helps you think clearly without handing you the answer.

title: FITOUT
subtitle: Visual Search Fashion Social
description: Identifying clothing items via image search and building a social layer around outfits—snap, match, and discover pieces with a clean visual-first flow.

title: Coro
subtitle: Biometric Tempo Sync
description: Heart rate variability music syncing that adapts playback and rhythm to your physiological state—minimal UI, maximum immersion.
